Why Gray's

Built on Trust,
Driven by Faith

Gray's Flooring Services was built to outperform big corporate companies, offering the same quality work at fair prices with the personal care only a family business can provide. Colossians 3:23 guides everything we do.

Schedule a Consultation

Locally Owned & Family Run

We are your neighbors, invested in the community and accountable to the people we serve across Florence, San Tan Valley, and the surrounding area.

Fully Licensed & Insured

Arizona ROC License #350881 means you are protected. We operate fully above board so your home and investment are always covered.

Clear Communication, Every Step

From first quote to final walkthrough, we keep you informed with no surprises, no runaround, and straight-talking honest service.

Flexible Financing Options

Beautiful floors should be accessible. Ask us about financing plans that make your project possible without the financial stress.

What We Do

Our Flooring
Specialties

From luxury vinyl plank to custom tile showers, we bring hands-on expertise to every project. Each job is completed with the same care we would give our own home.

01

Luxury Vinyl Plank

Waterproof, scratch-resistant, and beautiful. LVP is the smart choice for Arizona homes and high-traffic family living spaces.

02

Tile Installation

Precision-set tile for floors, kitchens, and entryways. We handle everything from standard ceramic to large-format porcelain.

03

Custom Tile Showers

Our signature specialty. We design and build beautiful, watertight custom tile showers that transform your bathroom into a retreat.

04

Carpet

Soft, warm, and comfortable underfoot. We install quality carpet in bedrooms, living areas, and throughout your home.

05

Repairs & Restoration

Damaged, warped, or worn floors? We assess and restore your existing flooring efficiently, saving you the cost of full replacement.

06

Hardwood Flooring

Classic beauty with lasting durability. Solid hardwood and engineered wood floors that elevate any space with warmth and natural character.

How It Works

Simple Process,
Beautiful Results

1

Request a Quote

Fill out our quick online form or give us a call. We gather the details about your project and get you scheduled fast.

2

Free Consultation

We visit your home, take measurements, discuss materials, and provide a transparent, detailed estimate.

3

Expert Installation

Our skilled crew arrives on time, works efficiently, and treats your home with the care they would give their own.

4

Final Walkthrough

We complete a thorough walkthrough together to make sure you are completely satisfied with the finished results.

Flexible Financing

Beautiful Floors
Made Affordable

We've partnered with Hearth to offer fast, flexible financing options for your flooring project. Check your rate in minutes with no impact to your credit score — and get the floors you love now.

  • Loans from $1,000 – $100,000
  • Check your rate with no credit score impact
  • Fast approval — often within minutes
  • Multiple term lengths to fit your budget
